title: Middle Eastern Goose Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful bowl dish from the Middle East, featuring roasted goose and a variety of spices.
instructions: Season the goose with the middle eastern spice blend and roast in the oven for 45 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is softened.
Add the chickpeas to the pan and stir to combine.
Cook the couscous according to package instructions.
To assemble the bowls, divide the cooked couscous among four bowls. Top with the roasted goose, chickpea mixture, and garnish with fresh parsley.
